docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF DEC-16-2025 - CONTINUED FOR PROOF OF SERVICE TO JAN-28-2026 AT 3:30 PM IN DEPT. 506 BY JUDGE PRO TEM MICHELE MCGILL. SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF JAN-28-2026 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF JAN-28-2026 BY VISITING JUDGE FREDRICKS. PLAINTIFF ROBERTNEISHA CROCKETT IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT IVAN AMEZCUA IS NOT PRESENT. PROOF OF SERVICE IS ON FILE FOR GREAT CARS. PLAINTIFF DISMISSES HER CASE AGAINST IVAN AMEZCUA. RIYAD ANAYAH AGREES TO SUBSTITUTE IN AS THE DEFENDANT. SERVICE IS WAIVED. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: JOSH M. FREDRICKS; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN. NOT REPORTED.(D506)
